description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. Add a build_app job in the build stage that runs npm config set user 0, npm config set unsafe-perm true, npm install -g polymer-cli bower, bower cache clean --allow-root, bower install --allow-root, bower prune --allow-root, and polymer build, and caches the node_modules/ and build/default directories keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Add a deploy_production job in the deploy stage, limited to the master branch, that runs npm config set user 0, npm config set unsafe-perm true, npm install -g firebase-tools, then lists files, changes into the build directory, and executes firebase use --token $FIREBASE_PROD_KEY default followed by firebase deploy --non-interactive --token $FIREBASE_PROD_KEY, deploying to the production environment at https://memeservices.com.
